headline: VyOS 1.5 LTS Now Available on Equinix Network Edge, Bringing VPP-Accelerated Performance and Automation-First Networking to the Global Interconnection Fabric

headline: Equinix Collaborates with Cisco and NVIDIA to Deploy Secure AI Factories Across Global Data Center Footprint
summary: Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company®, today unveiled an expanded collaboration with Cisco and NVIDIA to accelerate enterprise AI. Working with its partners, the company will enable customers to deploy the Cisco Secure AI Factory with NVIDIA across its global network of high-performance data centers, providing customers with standardized AI factory blueprints and automation that simplify deployments.
